'''nofamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hobbitesque|hobbitesque]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-f-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hobbitesque|hobbitesque]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nofamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nofamithi|nofamithi]] || [[word:nofamiji|nofamiji]] || [[word:nofamishi|nofamishi]] || [[word:nofamiki|nofamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nofamuthuthu|nofamuthuthu]] || [[word:nofamujuju|nofamujuju]] || [[word:nofamushushu|nofamushushu]] || [[word:nofamukuku|nofamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nofamuthu|nofamuthu]] || [[word:nofamuju|nofamuju]] || [[word:nofamushu|nofamushu]] || [[word:nofamuku|nofamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nofamufthuf|nofamufthuf]] || [[word:nofamufjuf|nofamufjuf]] || [[word:nofamufshuf|nofamufshuf]] || [[word:nofamufkuf|nofamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nofamethe|nofamethe]] || [[word:nofameje|nofameje]] || [[word:nofameshe|nofameshe]] || [[word:nofameke|nofameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nofamothotho|nofamothotho]] || [[word:nofamojojo|nofamojojo]] || [[word:nofamoshosho|nofamoshosho]] || [[word:nofamokoko|nofamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nofamotho|nofamotho]] || [[word:nofamojo|nofamojo]] || [[word:nofamosho|nofamosho]] || [[word:nofamoko|nofamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nofamofthof|nofamofthof]] || [[word:nofamofjof|nofamofjof]] || [[word:nofamofshof|nofamofshof]] || [[word:nofamofkof|nofamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nofamïfthïf|nofamïfthïf]] || [[word:nofamïfjïf|nofamïfjïf]] || [[word:nofamïfshïf|nofamïfshïf]] || [[word:nofamïfkïf|nofamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nofamïfthïfthïf|nofamïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:nofamïfjïfjïf|nofamïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:nofamïfshïfshïf|nofamïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:nofamïfkïfkïf|nofamïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nofamïfthïf|nofamïfthïf]] || [[word:nofamïfjïf|nofamïfjïf]] || [[word:nofamïfshïf|nofamïfshïf]] || [[word:nofamïfkïf|nofamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nofamïfthïf|nofamïfthïf]] || [[word:nofamïfjïf|nofamïfjïf]] || [[word:nofamïfshïf|nofamïfshïf]] || [[word:nofamïfkïf|nofamïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nofamæthæ|nofamæthæ]] || [[word:nofamæjæ|nofamæjæ]] || [[word:nofamæshæ|nofamæshæ]] || [[word:nofamækæ|nofamækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nofamathatha|nofamathatha]] || [[word:nofamajaja|nofamajaja]] || [[word:nofamashasha|nofamashasha]] || [[word:nofamakaka|nofamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nofamatha|nofamatha]] || [[word:nofamaja|nofamaja]] || [[word:nofamasha|nofamasha]] || [[word:nofamaka|nofamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nofamafthaf|nofamafthaf]] || [[word:nofamafjaf|nofamafjaf]] || [[word:nofamafshaf|nofamafshaf]] || [[word:nofamafkaf|nofamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nofamasha|nofamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nofamshësha|nofamshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nofamrosha|nofamrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nofamusha|nofamusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nofamyasha|nofamyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonofamnkshësha|gonofamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonofamnkrosha|gonofamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonofamnkmusha|gonofamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonofamnkyasha|gonofamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nofafamasha|nofafamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nofafamshësha|nofafamshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nofafamrosha|nofafamrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nofafamusha|nofafamusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nofafamyasha|nofafamyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonofafamnkshësha|gonofafamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonofafamnkrosha|gonofafamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonofafamnkmusha|gonofafamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonofafamnkyasha|gonofafamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nefæmasha|nefæmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nefæmshësha|nefæmshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nefæmrosha|nefæmrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nefæmusha|nefæmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nefæmyasha|nefæmyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonefæmnkshësha|gonefæmnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonefæmnkrosha|gonefæmnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonefæmnkmusha|gonefæmnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonefæmnkyasha|gonefæmnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nofamasha|nofamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nofamshësha|nofamshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nofamrosha|nofamrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nofamusha|nofamusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nofamyasha|nofamyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonofamnkshësha|gonofamnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonofamnkrosha|gonofamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonofamnkmusha|gonofamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonofamnkyasha|gonofamnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
